zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor FitzAlan於大約1308年出生在英國素可阿盧德爾 卡素時，她的父親Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel24歲，母親Alice de Warenne22歲。她於1323年之前與William Porter結婚。她去世於1347年3月30日之前在英國波克夏金斯頓 李爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor FitzAlan于大约1308年出生在英国素可阿盧德爾 卡素时，她的父亲Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel24岁，母亲Alice de Warenne22岁。她于1323年之前与William Porter结婚。她去世于1347年3月30日之前在英国波克夏金斯頓 李爾。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor FitzAlan was born about 1308, in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, her father, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, was 24 and her mother, Alice de Warenne, was 22. She married William Porter before 1323. She died before 30 March 1347, in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor FitzAlan est née environ 1308, à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice de Warenne, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé William Porter avant 1323. Elle est décédée avant 30 mars 1347, à Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor FitzAlan um 1308 in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel 24 und ihre Mutter Alice de Warenne 22. Sie hat vor 1323 William Porter geheiratet. Sie starb vor 30. März 1347 in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor FitzAlan è nata il circa 1308 nel Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, sua padre, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Alice de Warenne, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato William Porter prima del 1323. Morì prima del 30 marzo 1347, nel Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor FitzAlanが約1308年にイギリススセックスアルンデル カストルで生まれた時，父Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundelは24歳，母Alice de Warenneは22歳であった。1323年以前にWilliam Porterと結婚した。彼女は1347年3月30日以前にイギリスバークシュアイアキングストン リスルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor FitzAlan(이)가 대략 1308년 영국 수세스 아런들 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Warenne(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1323년 이전 William Porter(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1347년 3월 30일 이전 영국 버크실르 킨그스턴 리슬일에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor FitzAlan родилась около 1308 г. в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Warenne, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Porter перед 1323 г. Она умерла перед 30 марта 1347 г. в местности кингстон лисл, биркшир, Англия.
